# Build an AMT Report Card

## Lesson Goal

Turn comparison into dimension scores.

## What to Notice

The report card makes a fuzzy transcription problem discussable.

## Work With the Notebook

- [Open the notebook source](https://github.com/buildLittleWorlds/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/blob/main/notebooks/16_report_card/notebook.py)
- Browser notebook: local-first for this lesson because it uses upload, notation, audio, or model dependencies that are not reliable in WASM.

Run locally:

```bash
uv run marimo edit notebooks/16_report_card/notebook.py
```

## Feedback Lens

A strong critique says what each metric captures and what it misses.

## Instructor Notes

Use this lesson as a small checkpoint. Before asking students to add features,
ask them to name the input, the transformation, the output, and the current
limitation. That habit will matter more in later transcription notebooks than
any one line of code.
